name: Black Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, then mix in the vanilla extract.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and nutmeg into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in the black walnut flavoring.
6. Roll the dough into 1 1/2-inch diameter balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Chill the rolls for at least 24 hours.
8. Preheat the oven to 410°F (205°C).
9. Cut the chilled rolls into thin slices.
10. Bake in batches for about 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Note: This recipe yields approximately 48 cookies.
